title: assertion failed on
poc:
create table crash_me (a integer not null,b char(10)
 not null);
select a from crash_me order by 1;
key_bug_features: ordering results from a table with constraints
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table ORDER BY age;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC;
